Operation.xpath: /Defs/ThingDef[(defName="GW_IF_3x6MundaneRug" or defName="GW_IF_4x4MundaneRug" or defName="GW_IF_4x6MundaneRug" or defName="GW_IF_8x8MundaneRug" or defName="GW_IF_3x6RoyalRug" or defName="GW_IF_4x4RoyalRug" or defName="GW_IF_4x6RoyalRug" or defName="GW_IF_8x8RoyalRug")]/designationCategory
